name: Chasen Holdings Limited
summary: Chasen Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides relocation, logistics, and technical and engineering services in Singapore, the People's Republic of China, Malaysia, the United States, Vietnam, and Thailand. The company operates through three segments: Specialist Relocation Solutions, Third Party Logistics, and Technical & Engineering. The Specialist Relocation Solutions segment offers machinery and equipment moving services through projects or maintenance contracts. The Third Party Logistics segment provides packing services and supplies packaging and crating materials; and offers warehousing of customers' new or replaced machinery and equipment, and land transportation services. The Technical & Engineering segment provides turnkey facilities and engineering solutions, as well as repair and maintenance services to customers in the high tech electronic industries; construction projects of customers in the marine, property development, and oil and gas industries; and contract manufacturing services in the electronics, telecommunications, and other high technology industries. Chasen Holdings Limited also offers freight forwarding and shipping, general contracting, artifact packaging, construction and engineering, trucking, rigging, management consultancy, general building engineering design and consulting, and scaffolding equipment services; services on cryogenic pumps; and scaffolding services to marine and construction industries; and services. In addition, the company engages in the general activities related to machinery and equipment; process engineering and construction; structural steel fabrication supply and installation; precision manufacturing of machine tool accessories; design, engineering, and installation of machinery and equipment; and projects and general trading activities. Chasen Holdings Limited was founded in 1995 and is based in Singapore.
